title: Shrink
description: This creature's Attacks deal [blue]30%[/blue] less damage for the next 3 turns.
smart_description: {ApplierName.StringValue:cond:While {} is alive, your|[gold]{OwnerName}'s[/gold]} Attacks deal [blue]{DamageDecrease}%[/blue] less damage{Amount:cond:==1? next turn|>1? for the next [blue]{}[/blue] turns|}.
notes: Damage reduction is 30%. Stack type is Counter (duration-based, decrements each turn). When Amount < 0 (infinite), stack type becomes Single instead. ApplierName is set to the monster's title if applied by a monster. Power is automatically removed if the applier dies.
